title: dryas ajanensis subsp. beringensis
intro: Dryas ajanensis subsp. beringensis, also known as the Bering dryad or Bering dryas, is a plant species belonging to the genus Dryas, which is native to the Bering region. It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
